lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What promise did Saul make to Jonathan about David?
answers: He would let David keep Goliath's sword
He would let David be king after he died

questions.text: How did Saul try to kill David the first time in this story?
answers: He threw a spear at him while he played the harp
He locked him in a room

questions.text: How did Michal help David escape from Saul?
answers: She used a statue and goat hair to make it look like he was in bed
She hid him in a cave
She let him ride her fastest camel
She made a disguise for him to wear

questions.text: Why didn’t David go to the New Moon feast?
answers: To see how Saul reacted and if it was safe to return

questions.text: What did Jonathan plan to use to signal David?
Why was Saul angry with Jonathan at the feast?
answers: He thought Jonathan was on David’s side
Jonathan chewed with his mouth open

questions.text: What did Saul do to Jonathan in his anger?
answers: He threw a spear at him

questions.text: How did Jonathan signal that it was not safe for David to return?
answers: He clapped his hands three times

questions.text: Who cried more when Jonathan and David said goodbye?
How is Jesus the greatest friend?
answers: He was willing to die to save His friends
He helps us escape from King Saul
